name: mcp-devops-onpremise
description: MCP server for on-premises Azure DevOps — browse repositories, pull requests, work items, and wikis.
long_description:
Connect your AI agent to an on-premises Azure DevOps Server (TFS). Supports browsing repositories, diffing pull requests, reading and creating work items, managing wiki pages, and more.

Requires network access to your internal DevOps server.

DEVOPS_API_URL.title: DevOps Server URL
DEVOPS_API_URL.description: Base URL of your Azure DevOps Server, including organization and project (e.g. https://devops.company.com/MyOrg/MyProject)

DEVOPS_USERNAME.title: Username
DEVOPS_USERNAME.description: Windows domain username (e.g. DOMAIN\username), or leave empty when using a PAT

DEVOPS_PASSWORD.title: Password / PAT
DEVOPS_PASSWORD.description: Windows password, or a Personal Access Token (PAT). When using a PAT, leave Username empty.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_get
tools.description: Retrieve a pull request by ID.

pull_request_id.description: The ID of the pull request to retrieve.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_list_threads
tools.description: List comment threads on a pull request.

pull_request_id.description: The ID of the pull request.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_list_thread_comments
tools.description: List comments in a specific PR thread.

pull_request_id.description: The ID of the pull request.

thread_id.description: The ID of the thread to retrieve.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_create_comment
tools.description: Create a new comment thread on a pull request.

comment_content.description: The text content or markdown of the comment.

file_path.description: File path relative to the root of the repository.

line_number.description: Optional 1-based line number for an inline comment.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_reply_comment
tools.description: Reply to an existing PR comment thread.

comment_content.description: The text content or markdown of the reply.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_update_thread
tools.description: Update the status of a PR comment thread.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_update_comment
tools.description: Update an existing PR comment.

comment_id.description: ID of the comment to update.

tools.name: devops_pull_request_delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a PR comment.

tools.name: devops_repository_list
tools.description: List all repositories.

tools.name: devops_repository_get
tools.description: Get repository details by name or ID.

tools.name: devops_repository_commit_changes
tools.description: List files changed in a commit.

tools.name: devops_repository_diffs_commits
tools.description: Diff two commits.

tools.name: devops_repository_item_content
tools.description: Get raw file content at a specific commit.

path.description: Path of the item, e.g. src/foo.cs

version.description: Commit ID to fetch the file from.

tools.name: devops_get_item_content_diff
tools.description: Get line-level text diff of a file between two commits.

path.description: Path of the file to diff.

tools.name: devops_wiki_page_get_by_url
tools.description: Get wiki page metadata and content by URL.

wiki_url.description: Full URL of the wiki page.

include_content.description: Whether to include page content. Defaults to false.

tools.name: devops_wiki_page_create_or_update
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page.

parent_path.description: Relative path of the parent wiki page, or '/' for root.

tools.name: devops_wiki_page_update
tools.description: Update an existing wiki page by ID.

content.description: New content for the wiki page.

tools.name: devops_wiki_page_delete
tools.description: Delete a wiki page by ID.

tools.name: devops_work_item_get
tools.description: Get a work item by numeric ID.

work_item_id.description: The numeric work item ID to fetch.

tools.name: devops_work_item_attachment_get
tools.description: Download a work item attachment by ID.

file_name.description: The file name of the attachment.

save_path.description: Optional local directory path to save the file.

tools.name: devops_work_item_type_get
tools.description: Get a work item type definition.

tools.name: devops_work_item_query_by_wiql
tools.description: Run a WIQL query and return matching work items.

top.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: devops_work_item_create
tools.description: Create a new work item.

type.description: The work item type to create, e.g. 'Task', 'Bug'.

fields.description: List of field objects with 'name' and 'value'.

tools.name: devops_work_item_update
tools.description: Update fields on a work item.

work_item_id.description: The numeric work item ID to update.

tools.name: devops_work_item_delete
tools.description: Delete a work item (to Recycle Bin or permanently).

work_item_id.description: The numeric ID of the work item to delete.

destroy.description: If true, permanently destroys the item. WARNING: irreversible.

tools.name: devops_work_item_undelete
tools.description: Restore a work item from the Recycle Bin.

work_item_id.description: The numeric ID of the deleted work item to restore.

tools.name: devops_work_item_link_update
tools.description: Add or remove a relation link between work items.

work_item_id.description: The numeric ID of the work item to modify.

link_to_id.description: The numeric ID of the work item to link to or unlink from.

tools.name: devops_work_item_artifact_link_update
tools.description: Add or remove an artifact link on a work item.

work_item_id.description: The numeric ID of the work item to modify.

artifact_id.description: Artifact identifier, format depends on link_type.

tools.name: devops_work_item_comment_list
tools.description: List comments on a work item.

top.description: Maximum number of comments to return. Defaults to 50.

tools.name: devops_work_item_comment_add
tools.description: Add a comment to a work item.

tools.name: devops_work_item_comment_update
tools.description: Update an existing work item comment.

comment_id.description: The numeric ID of the comment to update.

tools.name: devops_work_item_comment_delete
tools.description: Delete a work item comment.

comment_id.description: The numeric ID of the comment to delete.
